caption: A man with a white beard, wearing a light-colored traditional Indian kurta and a matching sleeveless vest, speaks from behind a podium. He is positioned against a textured, dark green wall with a geometric, stepped pattern. Two microphones extend from the podium toward him, and a tall, narrow glass vase containing thin branches and red flowers stands to his side. Throughout the sequence, the man gestures with his right hand to emphasize his points. He begins by raising his index finger, then lowers his hand slightly while looking toward the side. He then raises his index finger again before clenching his hand into a loose fist as he continues to speak. His facial expression remains focused and serious as he addresses an unseen audience.
